ai_application.problem_addressed: Manual parcel sorting at high-volume hubs could not keep pace with e-commerce volume growth, causing sorting errors and missed delivery windows.
ai_application.solution_description: Computer vision systems mounted above conveyor belts read barcodes, labels, and package dimensions in real time to route each parcel to the correct chute automatically, replacing manual scanning and sorting.
ai_application.deployment_scale: 22 DHL sortation hubs across Europe and North America

supporting_metrics: Throughput increased by 40% without additional headcount
Mis-sorted parcel rate reduced from 1.2% to 0.5%
Labor cost per sorted parcel reduced by 35%
reported_outcomes.source: DHL Innovation Report 2021, Logistics Management Journal 2022

embed_text: DHL deploys computer vision at 22 sorting hubs to automate parcel routing, achieving 99.5% sorting accuracy and 40% throughput increase without additional headcount.
